zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Wychingham於1358年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir William De Witchingham Knight30歲，母親Margaret Braose28歲。他於大約1375年與Alice Flete結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年10月14日在英國諾福爾可格亞特 維其加姆享年86歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可格亞特 維其加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Wychingham于1358年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir William De Witchingham Knight30岁，母亲Margaret Braose28岁。他于大约1375年与Alice Flete结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年10月14日在英国諾福爾可格亞特 維其加姆享年86岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可格亞特 維其加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Wychingham was born in 1358, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William De Witchingham Knight, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Braose, was 28. He married Alice Flete about 1375. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 14 October 1444, in Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Wychingham est né en 1358, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William De Witchingham Knight, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Braose, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice Flete environ 1375. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1444, à Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Wychingham 1358 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William De Witchingham Knight 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Braose 28. Er hat um 1375 Alice Flete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1444 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Wychingham è nato il nel 1358 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William De Witchingham Knight, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Braose, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice Flete circa 1375. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 14 ottobre 1444, nel Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Witchingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Wychinghamが1358年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir William De Witchingham Knightは30歳，母Margaret Braoseは28歳であった。約1375年にAlice Fleteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1444年10月14日にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ウィトチンガムで86歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクグレアト ウィトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Wychingham(이)가 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William De Witchingham Knight(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Braose(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1375년 Alice Flete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 10월 14일 영국 노르폴크 그리트 윗친그함에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 그리트 윗친그함에 묻혔다.

mn.Wood Rising, Norfolk,Englnad: Woodrising, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Wychingham nasceu em 1358, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William De Witchingham Knight, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Braose, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Flete aproximadamente 1375. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1444, em Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Wychingham родился в 1358 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William De Witchingham Knight было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Braose, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Flete около 1375 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 14 октября 1444 г. в местности грит вичингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности грит вичингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Wychingham nació en 1358, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William De Witchingham Knight, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Braose, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alice Flete aproximadamente 1375. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1444, en Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Great Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
